Local permits, municipal registrations, and non-DSPS authorizations are outside this source entry.

officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Wisconsin DSPS LicensE credential lookup. Future work should narrow relevant credential types before fixture or adapter work.
